stories.title: AI consultant uses ChatGPT, AlphaFold, and Grok to find a possible treatment for his dog's cancer
stories.summary: An Australian AI consultant used ChatGPT, AlphaFold, and Grok to find a possible treatment for his dog Rosie's incurable cancer. The story went viral after high-profile AI executives like OpenAI's Greg Brockman and Deepmind's Demis Hassabis shared it as proof of what AI can already do. The article A
